basic_details.job_title: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Women and Child Development Department Odisha
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Department Odisha (WCD Odisha) Anganwadi Sahayika Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of WCD Odisha. A total of 02 vacancies have been announced through the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Sahayika Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18 years, Max: 35 years as on 01.01.2026
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years (as on 01.01.2026)

qualification.education_qualification: 12th pass and resident of the Anganwadi center area.
qualification.details: Anganwadi Sahayika: 12th pass and must be a resident of the Anganwadi center area.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Sahayika Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Sahayika Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download WCD Odisha Anganwadi Sahayika Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Sahayika Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Sahayika Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Anganwadi Helper post is 16th July 2026. Ensure you complete the process before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the Anganwadi Helper post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Anganwadi Helper post is 18 years as of January 1, 2026. Candidates must meet this age criterion to be eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Anganwadi Helper post is 35 years as of January 1, 2026. Age relaxation rules may apply as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for Anganwadi Helper?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 12th grade (12th pass) and should be a resident of the specific Anganwadi center area where they are applying.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for Anganwadi Helper?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Anganwadi Helper post in the WCD Odisha recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Anganwadi Helper position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Anganwadi Helper post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 5000/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Anganwadi Helper role?
faq.answer: The primary selection process for the Anganwadi Helper role involves Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their submitted documents.

faq.question: Q9. When does the online application process begin?
faq.answer: The online application process for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper recruitment begins on July 2, 2026. Make sure to apply within the specified application window.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the official notification, there is no mention of any application fee for the Anganwadi Helper posts in this recruitment drive.
